theme_and_archetype.reasoning: A Danish kidney foundation management tool used by volunteers. The UI should evoke trust, calm, and professionalism (Nordic minimalism), entirely avoiding generic SaaS 'tech-bro' or purple themes. Earthy tones blended with sharp Swiss-style utility for data heavy views.

headings.usage_rules: Tight tracking (tracking-tight) for h1 and h2. Use bold for primary emphasis, but keep h3/h4 in medium/regular weight for subtle hierarchy.

body.usage_rules: Clean, highly legible sans for data density. Relaxed line height (leading-relaxed) for reading, tight for data tables.

rules: Use #2C4C3B (Deep Forest Green) exclusively for primary CTAs to indicate action.
Never use pure black or grey; all neutrals are tinted towards a warm olive/sand hue.
Maintain 4.5:1 contrast for all text against backgrounds.
Hover states must shift to a lighter hue of the active color.

layout_and_spacing.strategy: The 'Control Room' Grid - Dense, functional, cardless emphasis
layout_and_spacing.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar on desktop (w-64), hidden on mobile behind hamburger.
layout_and_spacing.generous_spacing: Use padding generously in container boundaries (p-8 or p-12 on desktop) to give data breathing room.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align tables, dense content, and forms. Use optical alignment for icons/buttons.

grid_usage.dashboard_overview: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 gap-6. Summary widgets span 1 col, main tables span 2 or 3 cols.

component_rules.framework: React JS (.js/.jsx) with Tailwind CSS and Shadcn UI.
component_rules.surfaces: Grid Borders and Flat Surfaces. Avoid heavy drop shadows. Use 1px borders (#E5E7E2) to define areas. If using shadows, use extremely soft ambient shadow (shadow-sm).
component_rules.border_radius: Subtle roundness: rounded-md (6px) or rounded-sm (4px). Avoid pill shapes.
component_rules.forms_and_inputs: Shadcn UI base. Flat look, 1px border. Focus state must use ring-2 ring-primary/20 and border-primary.
component_rules.tables: Shadcn Table. Flat design, hover states on rows (bg-surface_alt). No vertical borders, subtle horizontal dividers.
component_rules.buttons: Flat solid background for primary. Ghost buttons for secondary actions to reduce visual clutter.
component_rules.modals: Solid white backgrounds (no glassmorphism). Minimalist header, clear primary/secondary actions at bottom right.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Subtle background color shift on rows/cards. Links change to primary color.
motion_and_interactions.transitions: transition-colors duration-200 ease-in-out for buttons and inputs.
motion_and_interactions.loading: Use minimalist spinners or skeleton loaders in #F3F4F1.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5 for a cleaner, modern look. Keep sizes to 16px (w-4 h-4) or 20px (w-5 h-5).

image_urls.description: Minimalist green gradient texture for the login split-screen background.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets WCAG AA standards. Use text-white on primary buttons.
accessibility_and_testing.focus: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements via focus-visible:ring-2.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, row actions) MUST have a data-testid attribute formatted as kebab-case-role.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using a modern minimalist aesthetic: mostly white/off-white with subtle grey/green-tinted borders. Code should be in .js/.jsx.
Implement a Sidebar layout for authenticated views (Admin vs User).
In the members list and event detail page, use Shadcn tables to render data cleanly.
For the file import (Excel to JSON), use an elegant file dropzone component. No complex visual flair needed, just clear instructions.
Use Manrope for headings and Work Sans for body text.
Inject the login_background image in a split-screen design for the authentication page.
Avoid using card components excessively. Instead, use sections with subtle borders and generous padding to group content.
